# Sherman Art Works

> Handmade glass Judaica and decorative art, crafted in Israel by the Sherman family. We make Shabbat candlesticks, Kiddush cups, shofars, horn goblets, mezuzah cases and custom corporate gifts. Free worldwide shipping.

Sherman Art Works is a family-run artisan studio based in Israel. Three generations of the Sherman family handcraft blown and fused glass Judaica using traditional techniques. All products are made by hand in the studio and shipped internationally. Orders are placed via WhatsApp or email; there is no automated checkout.

## Shop

- [Candlesticks](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html): Handmade Murano-style glass Shabbat candlesticks in multiple patterns — black-and-white stripes, gold-and-red stripes, green dots, and black-and-white dots. ₪775 per pair (~$210 USD). Free worldwide shipping.
- [Shofars & Horn Goblets](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars-goblets.html): Silver-plated ram's horn wine goblets (Lion of Judah, Menorah) and a Jerusalem wine horn decorated with traditional Jewish symbols. Custom shofars with personalised symbol (Menorah, Jerusalem, Star of David) and text engraving are available. Prices ₪473–₪1,050.
- [Kiddush Cups](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html): Handmade glass Kiddush cups for Shabbat and Jewish holidays. Made to order.
- [Trays & Bowls](https://shermanartworks.com/trays-bowls.html): Decorative handmade glass bowls and sculptural trays. Organic, asymmetric forms with marbled glass finishes. ₪1,190.
- [Mezuzahs](https://shermanartworks.com/mezuzahs.html): Handmade mezuzah cases made from Oryx, Ram and Kudu horns covered in silver. ₪700 each. Mezuzah case only — parchment (klaf) not included.
- [Business Gifts](https://shermanartworks.com/business-gifts.html): Custom shofars and handmade glass corporate gifts, made to order with personalised symbols and text inscription. Suitable for Jewish organisations, synagogues and corporate clients.

## Custom Orders

- [Custom Orders](https://shermanartworks.com/custom-orders.html): Commission a one-of-a-kind handmade piece. Custom size, colour, shape and inscription available. Contact via WhatsApp or email.

## About

- [About Sherman Art Works](https://shermanartworks.com/about.html): The story of three generations of the Sherman family handcrafting glass art in Israel.

## Contact & Ordering

- [Contact](https://shermanartworks.com/contact.html): WhatsApp: +972-52-348-2278. Email: shermanartwork@gmail.com. We reply within 24 hours. All orders are placed via WhatsApp or email.
- [Shipping & Terms](https://shermanartworks.com/terms.html): Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Handcrafted to order — typical production time 2–4 weeks. Full terms and conditions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://shermanartworks.com/privacy.html): Privacy policy for shermanartworks.com.
